zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi於1150年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，他的父親Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd52歲，母親Adeliza Clare30歲。他和Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1190年在英國威爾斯享年40歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi于1150年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，他的父亲Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd52岁，母亲Adeliza Clare30岁。他和Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1190年在英国威尔斯享年40岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi was born in 1150, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd, was 52 and his mother, Adeliza Clare, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x. He died in 1190, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Bangor, Caernarvonshire, , Wales: Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi est né en 1150, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Clare, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x. Il est décédé en 1190, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi 1150 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd 52 und seine Mutter Adeliza Clare 30. Er hatte mit Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi è nato il nel 1150 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Clare, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x. Morì nel 1190, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigiが1150年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Cadwaladr ap Gruffuddは52歳，母Adeliza Clareは30歳であった。彼はAnnes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" xとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1190年にイギリスウェールズで40歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi(이)가 1150년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Clare(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 영국 웨일스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi nasceu em 1150, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Clare, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x. Ele faleceu em 1190, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi родился в 1150 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Clare, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi nació en 1150, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Adeliza Clare, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x. Murió en 1190, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
